title: Another Dimension-Invasion
body:
**[Discontinued Page]
[Compability with JEI]**

![BisectHosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/242713e1-dc13-4316-814f-06f895147084.png)

![Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/427695df233eba64668128d155e852163a7943ac.png)

"Get their souls, Refine them and Take the control Back!"

This mod will bring a challenge for new and not-so-new players! Most of the other infections will slowly increase until your world its dead, or even kill you at the start, but, this one, will spread only in the night after you SUMMON the INFECTION with the Dimensional Gate, without taking your world or making it impossible to play or enjoy.

This will mod bring a deadly infection of the souls in your world with a Four-Phase infection
[Main-Project Present in CurseForge]
More Models in my sketchfab Account: [https://sketchfab.com/Seeker_Dev](https://sketchfab.com/Seeker_Dev)


## Phase 0:

1. Vanilla Minecraft. No dangers, No Infection, Totally Optional to start the phase 1.
 

## Phase 1 (1 of Presence):

1. Only Parasites spawn naturally


## Phase 2, 600 Points (2 of Quantity):

1. Weaker infecteds spawn naturally
2. Boosts the stats of all mobs by 25% more
 

## Phase 3, 1600 Points (3 of Quality):

1. Mid-Infecteds start spawning
2. Now, entities below 20 Hp will, on death, summon a soulermite
3. Entities below 50 HP but above 20HP, have a 20% chance to revive with half of his HP
4. 50% Buff Stats
 

## Phase 4, 3200 Points (4 of Adapted):
1. As the name says, ALL the infected mobs will adapt to almost all type of damage, unless melee, and some of them, arrows.
2. Nodes and Evolved Threat spawn naturally... [Hard mode]
3. 100% Buff Stats
